Label: MAUDE Report
Description: A Medical Device Report (MDR) in the FDA Manufacturer and User Facility Device Experience (MAUDE) adverse event reporting system.

Label: Medical Device
Description: A medical device that is the subject of an adverse event report in the FDA MAUDE database.

Label: date of event
Description: The date on which the adverse event involving the medical device occurred.

Label: date received
Description: The date on which the MAUDE adverse event report was received by the FDA.

Label: event type
Description: The type of adverse event reported in the MAUDE report (e.g., injury, malfunction, death).

Label: involves device
Description: Links a MAUDE adverse event report to the medical device involved in the event.

Label: label
Description: A human-readable label for the medical device resource.

Label: product code
Description: The FDA product code that classifies the medical device by its intended use and indication.
